# Third-Party Components

TPPM builds upon the following projects. Each retains its original license.

## Mini-Agent

- **Repository:** https://github.com/DingA4/Mini-Agent
- **Directory:** `Mini-Agent-5-1/`
- **License:** MIT
- **Scope:** Agent runtime, LLM clients, tool system, CLI framework
- **Used by:** `src/tppm/` package (core platform)

## PersonaMem

- **Repository:** https://github.com/bowen-upenn/PersonaMem
- **License:** MIT
- **Scope:** Dataset and evaluation protocol for dynamic profile modeling
- **Used by:** `benchmarks/personamem/`

## LoCoMo

- **Repository:** https://github.com/snap-research/LoCoMo
- **License:** CC-BY-NC 4.0
- **Scope:** Long-range conversational memory benchmark
- **Used by:** `benchmarks/locomo/`

## PsyDial

- **Repository:** https://github.com/qiuhuachuan/PsyDial
- **License:** CC-BY-NC 4.0
- **Scope:** Psychological support dialogue quality benchmark
- **Used by:** `benchmarks/psydial/`
